meta.description: Complete multi-role sitemap for Figma wireframing — 29 pages, 8 user flows, full permissions matrix

pages.label: Root Redirect
pages.notes: Server component — redirects authenticated users to role-specific dashboard, unauthenticated to /login

pages.label: Login
pages.notes: Email/password login with Supabase auth. Redirects authenticated users to /. Includes role-based post-login routing.

pages.label: Register
pages.notes: Registration with role selection (patient or professional). Creates user + role-specific profile in Supabase.

pages.label: Patient Dashboard
pages.notes: Welcome greeting, next appointment card, recent 5 appointments list. Landing page after patient login.

pages.label: Search Professionals
pages.notes: Professional search with query, specialty, city filters. Three tabs: Classic grid, Map view, AI-powered search. Parallel availability slot lookup via RPC.

pages.label: Professional Detail
pages.notes: Professional profile with bio, services, reviews, availability calendar, booking form. Dynamic route.

pages.label: My Appointments
pages.notes: Tabbed view: upcoming, past, cancelled. Each card shows status, rating option for completed, cancellation dialog. Tracks which appointments have been rated.

pages.label: Patient Profile
pages.notes: User profile + patient details: address, insurance info, emergency contact. Edit form with Zod validation.

pages.label: Messages / Notifications
pages.notes: Notifications list (50 max) with read status tracking. Serves as the notification center.

pages.label: Notifications Redirect
pages.notes: Redirects to /patient/messages. Exists for URL consistency.

pages.label: Patient Settings
pages.notes: Notification preferences: email, SMS, appointment reminders, marketing. Toggle switches for each channel.

pages.label: Professional Dashboard
pages.notes: KPI strip (today appointments, revenue, patients, attendance rate), today's schedule, 7-day activity chart, quick actions, utility widgets. Staggered animation on load.

pages.label: Agenda / Calendar
pages.notes: Full calendar with day/week/month views. Appointment management, attendance tracking (present/late/absent/no-show), availability slots creation. Manual appointment creation. Google Calendar integration dialog. Auto-switches to day view on mobile.

pages.label: Patients Management
pages.notes: Patient list with KPIs (acquisition trends, insurance breakdown, frequency distribution). CRUD operations (create, edit, delete). Paginated table with search and filters. Charts for acquisition and insurance.

pages.label: Services Management
pages.notes: Services CRUD with KPIs (revenue per service, appointment volume). Table with pricing, duration, active/inactive toggle. Charts for revenue and appointment volume.

pages.label: Statistics & Analytics
pages.notes: Advanced analytics with KPIs (attendance, no-show, cancellation rates, revenue). Analyze and Compare modes. Heatmap, punctuality, service breakdown, AI insights. Date range and service filters. Year navigator.

pages.label: Reminders & Templates
pages.notes: Reminder rules and message templates management. KPIs (sent, delivered, bounce rate). Delivery trends, channel distribution, status charts. Tabs: rules, templates, history, settings. Email/SMS/WhatsApp channels.

pages.label: Professional Profile
pages.notes: Professional profile display with recent ratings (10 max). Profile editing.

pages.label: Support Tickets
pages.notes: Support ticket list with KPIs (total, open, resolved). Ticket conversation threads. Create new ticket dialog.

pages.label: Professional Settings
pages.notes: Auto-confirm appointments, notification channels, defaults. Toggle switches per setting.

pages.label: New Appointment Redirect
pages.notes: Redirects to /pro/agenda?create=true. Opens manual appointment creation dialog.

pages.label: Admin Dashboard
pages.notes: Platform overview: KPIs (total patients, verified professionals, monthly appointments, open tickets), today's count, pending verifications, top professionals table.

pages.label: User Management
pages.notes: All users table with role/status/search filters. Pagination. Role badges, verification status, action buttons.

pages.label: Professional Management
pages.notes: Professional list with specialty/city/status filters. Verification status management. Rating display. Pagination.

pages.label: Appointments Overview
pages.notes: Platform-wide appointments table with status/date/professional filters. Advanced joins for participant data. Pagination.

pages.label: Platform Statistics
pages.notes: Analytics dashboard: KPI strip, activity chart, growth chart, specialty distribution, professional/patient distribution, top professionals, alerts panel. Date range filtering.

pages.label: Content Management
pages.notes: Content pages and FAQs management. Tabbed interface. Publication status toggling.

pages.label: Support Tickets
pages.notes: Support ticket management with status/priority/date filters. Ticket rows with priority badges.

pages.label: System Settings
pages.notes: System-wide settings grouped by prefix from system_settings table. Key-value configuration.

flows.name: Patient Booking Flow
flows.description: Complete end-to-end appointment booking from search to confirmation

steps.action: Search by name, specialty, or city
Browse results in grid, map, or AI chat
View professional profile, services, reviews (optional)
Click 'Book' on ProfessionalCard — opens BookingModal
Step 1: Select service (auto-skipped if single service)
Step 2: Pick date on calendar, choose time slot (morning/afternoon)
Step 3: Add optional notes, confirm booking
Appointment appears in 'Upcoming' tab
View upcoming/past/cancelled tabs
Cancel upcoming appointment via CancelDialog (with reason)
Rate completed appointment via RatingDialog (score + comment)

flows.name: Patient Registration & Onboarding
flows.description: New patient registration and first login

steps.action: Fill registration form, select 'patient' role
Auto-redirect to patient dashboard
See welcome message, empty state prompts
Complete profile (address, insurance, emergency contact)

flows.name: Professional Daily Workflow
flows.description: Morning check-in and daily appointment management

steps.action: Review KPIs: today's appointments, attendance rate, revenue
Check today's schedule in TodaySchedule widget
Open agenda in day view (auto-selected on mobile)
Review and confirm pending appointments
Mark attendance: present, late, or absent for each patient
View appointment details via AppointmentDetailDialog

flows.name: Professional Availability Management
flows.description: Set up and manage availability slots

steps.action: Navigate to week or month view
Click 'New Availability' button — opens NewAvailabilityModal
Set day, start time, end time, recurrence
Availability slots appear on calendar as green blocks
Patients can now book into these slots via search

flows.name: Professional Patient Management
flows.description: Manage patient records and create manual appointments

steps.action: View patient list with KPIs and charts
Create new patient via CreatePatientDialog
Edit patient details via EditPatientDialog
Create manual appointment for existing patient via CreateManualAppointmentDialog

flows.name: Admin Professional Verification
flows.description: Review and verify new professional registrations

steps.action: See pending verifications count in KPI card
Filter by verification status 'pending'
Review professional profile, specialty, credentials
Approve or reject verification

flows.name: Admin Platform Oversight
flows.description: Monitor platform health and manage users

steps.action: Review KPIs: patients, professionals, appointments, tickets
Analyze growth trends, specialty distribution, alerts
Search and manage user accounts
Monitor platform-wide appointments
Handle open support tickets by priority

legend.full: Full access — can view and interact with all features
legend.read: Read-only — can view but not modify

apiRoutes.description: Initiates Google OAuth 2.0 flow for calendar integration
Handles OAuth callback, exchanges code for tokens, syncs calendars
Trigger sync for all selected calendars
